description: The agent-wake event schema and delivery contract. Authenticated HTTP ingress with portable event schema; durable dedup, retry/outbox, dead-letter visibility, routing, and identity. At least one agent delivery and one human delivery must be supported end to end.

event_id.description: Globally unique event ID; used for dedup

target.description: Routing label (e.g. oncall, build-bot) or principal/session/project

delivery_mode.description: Requested delivery mode; defaults to source-configured default

dedup_strategy: in-memory event_id set; lost on restart (post-restart replay not prevented)
invariants: Duplicate event_id rejected while daemon is running
Unsupported delivery modes are reported explicitly, not silently dropped
OpenCode supports silent_inject; Claude adapter drops silent events (honest partial)
Human webhook and email channels are signed/verified
Provenance correlation: resulting session/work retains source event correlation
